query: SELECT 'taskCompletion' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN notionLastEdited IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as filled, SUM(CASE WHEN notionLastEdited IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty FROM taskCompletion UNION ALL SELECT 'validationResults', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN notionLastEdited IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN notionLastEdited IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM validationResults;
